title: Spicy Double-Fried Canadian Kale Hot Pot
description: A spicy, crispy, one-pot Canadian dish featuring kale and double-fried chicken. Serve with rice or noodles for a filling meal.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large hot pot vessel over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the double-fried chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the kale, red pepper flakes, black pepper, and salt. Cook until the kale is wilted.
Pour in the rice vinegar and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the liquid has reduced slightly.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
Garnish with rice or noodles if preferred.
